title: ExpressionSetMessageToken - Metadata API
description: Represents an interface to retrieve, deploy, create, update, or delete information on Expression Set Message Token.

description.description: Description of the expression set message token.

developerName.description: Developer name of the expression set message token.

masterLabel.description: A user-friendly name for ExpressionSetMessageToken, which is defined when the ExpressionSetMessageToken is created.
